name: browserless
description: Browserless.io REST API tools for web scraping, screenshots, PDFs, search, and more

settings.name: API Token
settings.description: Your Browserless.io API token. Get one at https://www.browserless.io

settings.name: API URL
settings.description: Browserless API base URL. Regions: SFO (default): https://production-sfo.browserless.io, LON: https://production-lon.browserless.io, AMS: https://production-ams.browserless.io
